/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/runtime.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/input.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/cart.c.o CMakeFiles/glyphbox.dir/src/lua_api.c.o -o glyphbox -F/Library/Frameworks   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/luajit/2.1.1772619647/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/zbar/0.23.93_2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/luajit/2.1.1772619647/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/zbar/0.23.93_2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Library/Frameworks /Library/Frameworks/SDL2.framework/Versions/A/SDL2 -lluajit-5.1 -lz -lm -lzbar -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioUnit -framework CoreFoundation
